query:
SELECT 
  status_resumido,
  status_original,
  COUNT(*) AS qtd
FROM processos
GROUP BY status_resumido, status_original
ORDER BY status_resumido, qtd DESC;
command:

  status_original,
  COUNT(*) AS qtd
